seo.title: Haystack Guardrails for Fintech
seo.description: Compliance guide for Haystack agents in fintech. Meet SOX, PCI DSS requirements with Vex guardrails.

content.intro: Fintech teams using Haystack face heightened compliance risks due to the framework's flexible pipelines handling sensitive financial data like transaction records and credit decisions. Without guardrails, common issues like hallucinated financial advice or unexplainable model outputs can trigger SOX violations, PCI DSS breaches, or SEC enforcement. Vex provides runtime compliance checks as a custom Haystack component to ensure regulatory adherence and prevent catastrophic failures.

complianceRequirements.description: Requires accurate financial reporting and internal controls over data processing pipelines.
complianceRequirements.howVexHelps: Vex monitors pipeline outputs for data integrity, flagging type mismatches or hallucinated financial figures before they enter reporting systems.

complianceRequirements.description: Mandates encryption of cardholder data at rest and in transit, with strict access controls.
complianceRequirements.howVexHelps: Vex scans retrieved documents and generator outputs for unencrypted PII or card data, enforcing redaction and encryption checks.

complianceRequirements.description: Demands data minimization, consent, and right to explanation for automated decisions.
complianceRequirements.howVexHelps: Vex ensures retrievers only return relevant, consented data and validates generator responses stay within retrieved context to avoid hallucinations.

complianceRequirements.description: Financial advice must include clear disclaimers and be based on verifiable facts.
complianceRequirements.howVexHelps: Vex injects mandatory disclaimers into advice outputs and verifies all claims are grounded in retrieved documents.

industryRisks.name: Hallucinated Investment Advice
industryRisks.description: Generator produces false stock recommendations beyond retrieved context, violating SEC rules.
industryRisks.example: Pipeline recommends buying XYZ stock based on fabricated earnings data, causing client losses and regulatory fines.

industryRisks.name: Unencrypted Transaction Data Exposure
industryRisks.description: Retriever returns raw card numbers or account details without encryption checks.
industryRisks.example: Customer payment data leaks through RAG pipeline, triggering PCI DSS penalties up to $100K per incident.

industryRisks.name: Unexplainable Credit Decisions
industryRisks.description: Opaque model outputs fail audit requirements for credit scoring.
industryRisks.example: Denied loan applicant challenges decision; lack of retriever evidence leads to fair lending violations.

industryRisks.name: Missing Regulatory Disclaimers
industryRisks.description: Financial advice outputs omit required 'not personalized advice' disclaimers.
industryRisks.example: SEC audit discovers 10K+ advice responses without disclaimers, resulting in enforcement action.

implementation.title: Vex Guardrail Component for Haystack Pipeline
implementation.description: Add Vex as a custom component to validate retriever relevance and generator faithfulness.

implementation.title: PCI DSS PII Redaction Guardrail
implementation.description: Scan and redact sensitive financial data before processing or storage.

implementation.title: GDPR Data Minimization Validator
implementation.description: Ensure only consented, relevant data is retrieved and processed.

caseStudyScenario.heading: Haystack in Fintech: A Scenario
caseStudyScenario.scenario:
WealthTechCo deployed a Haystack RAG pipeline for personalized investment advice, using Elasticsearch retriever for market data and GPT-4 for answer generation. The pipeline processed 50K daily queries about stock recommendations, ETF allocations, and portfolio rebalancing. However, without compliance guardrails, the generator frequently hallucinated earnings projections, retriever returned outdated 10-K filings, and advice responses lacked SEC-mandated disclaimers.

During a routine SEC audit, examiners discovered responses recommending high-risk crypto ETFs without risk disclosures or verifiable data sources. PCI scans revealed unredacted account numbers in retrieved transaction histories. A customer complaint about a denied robo-advisor allocation triggered a fair lending investigation when the credit decision lacked explainability.
caseStudyScenario.outcome: After integrating Vex as a custom Haystack component, WealthTechCo achieved 99.7% retrieval relevance and 98.2% generator faithfulness. Vex automatically injected disclaimers, redacted PII across 2.3M documents monthly, and provided audit-ready explainability reports. The SEC audit passed with zero findings, PCI compliance score improved from 72% to 98%, and customer trust scores rose 27%. The platform processed $450M in AUM decisions without regulatory incidents.

cta.heading: Comply with Fintech Regulations Using Vex
cta.description: Add Vex to your Haystack pipelines today and eliminate compliance risks with one pip install.
